texto: At this point in history, our society tends to elevate and reward the specialist...This concentrated focus has brought some benefits...It may also be a modern malady. Specialization, when taken too far and allowed to define who and what we are, becomes limiting. It robs us of our wholeness and our self-sufficiency. It misses the big picture and confines us to a narrow zoom. And it leaves us at the mercy of experts.
explicacao: Citação de Keith Stewart sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “At this point in history, our society tends to elevate and reward the specialist...This concentra…” articula autoestima, capitalism, politics em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como termino e politics.
